deploy.startCommand: mkdir -p storage/app/public/fonts storage/app/public/galleries storage/app/public/projects storage/app/public/services storage/app/public/materials storage/app/public/settings && cp -n resources/fonts/* storage/app/public/fonts/ 2>/dev/null; php artisan storage:link --force || echo 'storage:link failed, using fallback route'; php artisan migrate --force && php artisan serve --host=0.0.0.0 --port=${PORT:-3000}
